# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No functional defects were introduced in this diff. `git diff` shows only metadata updates under `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/` (journal/run JSON), with no changes in `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, or `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`; therefore there are no new correctness, safety, or robustness issues to amend from the reviewed patch.

## Amendments

None.
